Package org.eventb.core.tool

Interface IFilterModule

All Superinterfaces:
IModule
All Known Subinterfaces:
IPOGFilterModule, ISCFilterModule
All Known Implementing Classes:
ContextAxiomFreeIdentsModule, ContextAxiomTheoremModule, FormulaFreeIdentsModule, MachineEventActionFISFilterModule, MachineEventActionFreeIdentsModule, MachineEventConvergenceModule, MachineEventExtendedModule, MachineEventGuardFreeIdentsModule, MachineEventGuardTheoremModule, MachineEventRefinesModule, MachineEventWitnessFreeIdentsModule, MachineFormulaFreeIdentsModule, MachineInvariantFreeIdentsModule, MachineInvariantTheoremModule, MachinePreviousEventLabelModule, MachineTheoremFilterModule, MachineVariableFromParameterModule, MachineVariantFreeIdentsModule, POGFilterModule, POGFilterTestModule, SCFilterModule, TheoremModule
public interface IFilterModule extends IModule
Basic type for filter modules. A filter module is one of the two kinds of modules (IModule) used by a core tool.

Filter modules are intended to evaluate a boolean condition on some element. It is implemented by the static checker and the proof obligation generator.

Since:
3.0
